name: DISHA - Indigenous Flight Controller
desciption: Developed India’s first indigenous flight controller ‘DISHA’ using the VEGA processor. Features include automatic ESC tuning, inbuilt display for real-time data, and WiFi module integration. Secure and ideal for defense applications.

name: Internship at IIT Guwahati - Robotics Lab
desciption: Worked under Prof. P.K. Das on drone swarm systems, autonomous navigation, and FOD detection. Achieved 97% accuracy in drone coordination and 92% accuracy in FOD detection using machine learning.

name: Falcon Scann - FOD Detection Drone
desciption: Developed a drone that scans airport runways for Foreign Object Debris using ML and computer vision. Integrated with QGroundControl and real-time mobile app feed.

name: Medi Falcon - Medical Emergency Drone
desciption: A drone system to deliver medical aid in emergencies. Uses LoRa with Raspberry Pi to transmit vitals like heart rate and SpO2. Real-time monitoring through Jetson Nano.

name: Crack Detection Drone for Railways
desciption: Drone with ML algorithms to detect cracks or abnormalities in railway tracks. Sends alerts to base station. Integrated with prior drone system for enhanced safety applications.

name: Apple Orchard Drone - Himachal Project
desciption: Developed a drone-based system for apple orchard management in Himachal Pradesh. Focus on health monitoring, nutrient/pest management, yield prediction, and data-driven marketing.

name: HackWars Finalist
desciption: Qualified as a finalist in the HackWars coding competition with a real-time data monitoring solution using Python, LoRa, and Jetson Nano.

name: Winner at GCON Vegathon, ISB Innoventure & InnoWave
desciption: Secured 1st position at multiple national-level robotics competitions showcasing autonomous drones and intelligent UAV systems.

name: Zinnovatio 2nd Place
desciption: Won 2nd place in Zinnovatio with a drone-based innovation, receiving a cash prize, medals, and subscriptions. Demonstrated system integration and automation skills.

name: Patent: VEGA Flight Controller
desciption: Filed a patent for a custom VEGA flight controller design with advanced features tailored for autonomous UAV operations.
